description: The 'Ndrina Trovato is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta from Marcedusa, Calabria, Italy. It is involved in drug trafficking and money laundering through construction companies and nightclubs. The clan has established a presence in northern Italy, particularly in Milan, Lecco, Como, and Varese since the early 1980s. It has alliances with other 'ndrine such as the Barbaro, Papalia, and Pelle-Vottari families.

country_links.evidence_quote: La droga veniva acquistata dai cartelli colombiani di Cali , Medellín , Barranquilla e Pereira
country_links.context: The organization purchased cocaine from Colombian cartels in Cali, Medellín, Barranquilla, and Pereira.

country_links.evidence_quote: portata in Ghana , dove truffando l' Organizzazione delle Nazioni Unite per l'alimentazione e l'agricoltura (FAO) avevano accesso ai suoi fondi ... e la si stoccava, infine veniva spedita in Italia
country_links.context: The organization shipped cocaine to Ghana for storage before sending it to Italy.
